title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Mayano Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Mayano Top Gun is
pointing and see a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look at those cuties! They're sooo adorable! I
want one!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I've already spent my allowance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun looks crestfallen, the light
vanishing from her eyes.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to win you one?
Do you want me to win you one?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You'd do that for me?! All right, then I'll be your
own personal cheer squad!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Go, go! You can do it! Gooooo, Trainerrrr! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail!
